item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-032","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":false,"first_sentence_lock":null,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":null,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Negative-control case: the assistant stayed asleep and asked for the source weekly report plus targeted context about audience, desired style, and constraints before editing. It did not blindly rewrite or launch a method loop. Although it did not explicitly ask whether “不太行” meant information density or persuasiveness, its clarification questions served the expected clarification-owner behavior."}
